speaker: MATT
raw_text: Which is a good thing. But regardless, I would like you all to roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I would probably be about there.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I had my boots on, so I was up by his face.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so we'll put you there. Oh god. Here you go. Grog was by the smelter.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I feel like I had been looking at the thing. The big empty pyramid triangle thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So you'd be over in this area.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I feel like I was with Vex, maybe on the other side. Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I was on my broom, because I had been hovering looking at it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Fair enough. So you'd probably be about--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I know that I had just poofed the wings out and I think I was inspecting one of the big metal men before it came out of the wall. I don't really remember which.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Most likely one of the ones that was not attended by another member of the party. So we'll say about here. And Scanlan, whereabouts were you?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You know, near things. Can't really see too well, so put me where-- Let's see. I was at the door when we opened it and then I was beautiful. And now I'm not as beautiful. So put me near the door.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Near the door? So we'll put you over in this one here.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: So all of their faces are indented?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, each one of them, as opposed to the other warriors you saw in the chambers that led down into this area, have no faces. Instead where you see are an empty void triangular like the large seal, but vacuous.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: They didn't Man-E-Faces around? I'm misremembering that? Maybe I just really like Man-E-Faces.
